title: Three Robbers and a Lion
original_title: Folk og røvere i Kardemomme by
overview: The three thieves Kasper, Jesper and Jonathan lives together with their always hungry lion in the little town of Kardemomme town, the home to a fair but kind police officer, and the strict Aunt Sofie.
